core_mechanism: iterative message-passing fixed-point decoding on a product graph of overlapping local constraints, where each element's estimate is repeatedly updated from neighboring constraints using dynamically-updated reliability/confidence weights that steer error-and-erasure correction until convergence
brief_reason: The abstract describes an iterative hard-message-passing error-and-erasure decoder for product-structured codes that carries dynamic reliability scores between component constraints, i.e. repeated local constraint updates weighted by evolving confidence values propagating over a coupled constraint structure.
